creator: marc@softwarehackery.com
text:
The attached shar provides a port of the gnucash program, major version
        2.x.x (tested with 2.0.4). After several attempts to contact the
        maintainer of the finance/gnucash port (major version 1.x.x), and not
        receiving any response, this seemed to be the most reasonable way
        to get a more up-to-date version in the ports tree.

Fix: Apply the attached shar and build as a normal port.
How-To-Repeat: 	The usual make xxx commands for ports should work fine.
